license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.2ajgacn
title: Quick staining procedure of nuclei in Euplotes using DAPI
author: Rachele Cesaroni

steps_raw.instruction: Mix concentrated Euplotes cells together with Ethanol 70% in a ratio of 1:1. Better to have a completely starved Euplotes culture to avoid autofuorescence from bacteria/algae.
Add DAPI (0.01 mg/ml) to the mix in a ratio of 1:10, and stain for 15 minutes at room temperature.
